6.4.19.a68387f71cb29dc73ef22c917a6c6adf750b4c69: - Improved accessibility if users configure a dynamic font in settings (bigger text sizes)
6.4.19.4998ddea1808b5c1bdbd90fe70b0a7992ba24ffa: - Fixed omemo devicelist updates not published properly
6.4.19.363778539e0fe82ff425511c4461d7366f065553: - Fixed audio playback not working after recording a voice message
6.4.19.199a7c62e46639ae113ee4210387efc6295c0005: - Allow users to ping the push appserver for debugging notification problems
6.4.19.777505aa2dc1d0afc81925e026193f40a158aaa1: - Sort media gallery items from most recent to oldest
6.4.19.12aab53148ac46feda390064e43dad66b2bcd9fd: - Fixed endless loop adding/removing devices from omemo devicelist
6.4.19.8043805fa52952db1361483dd30b0fa00722d068: - Don't try to retrieve messages older than our autodelete timeout, if active

6.4.19.9850c5e1593c547a6a083e182ce464611c509807: - Moved heavy deallocation work to a background task to make initial connection faster
6.4.19.461f860288066aa00837096d8447bea79afa9d5c: - Fixed crash when opening a new chat that wasn't listed as active before
6.4.19.3bd04ee8669a319eb13fe0519f7b5a1b1ffd00f1: - Fixed internal state updates taking too long
6.4.19.5f07e7a7ff51c2450d9e2a5c6d4e6743499f4d8b: - Fixed joining of groups/channels after a longer period of being offline
6.4.19.410e2482d0806c35580d481564d75efca888ca87: - Fixed long delay when sometimes answering an incoming call
6.4.19.1950a5e8def95982bc2a33b79d6c829e78a4ce10: - Fixed audio recording timer visibility in dark mode
